title: 5 things the Bible says about work (and none of them are hustle)
caption:
God had a man in a garden. Day six. Before sin. Before the fall. And he was working.

That's not an accident.

Scripture has a lot to say about work — and almost none of it sounds like what the hustle crowd is selling you. It doesn't say grind until you prove yourself. It doesn't say your worth is your output. But it does say work — hard, skilled, whole-hearted work — is woven into what a man of God actually is.

Five passages. None of them hustle. All of them useful.

"Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters." — Colossians 3:23

If that verse actually got hold of you, your whole Monday changes.

—

Comment "work" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
